cases.name: 代表例: 合格ライン以上の候補を選ぶ

input.factory: () => ({ line: 80, score: function(add, penalty) { return this.base + this.bonus + add - penalty; }, candidates: [{ name: "Aoba", base: 70, bonus: 5, args: [6, 1] }, { name: "Mika", base: 65, bonus: 8, args: [4, 0] }, { name: "Ren", base: 82, bonus: 0, args: [0, 3] }, { name: "Sora", base: 75, bonus: 2, args: [7, 2] }] })

cases.name: 境界値: 点数が合格ラインと同じ候補を含める

input.factory: () => ({ line: 100, score: function(multiplier, add) { return this.base * multiplier + add - this.penalty; }, candidates: [{ name: "Alpha", base: 20, penalty: 5, args: [5, 0] }, { name: "Beta", base: 18, penalty: 0, args: [5, 10] }, { name: "Gamma", base: 12, penalty: 2, args: [8, 8] }] })

cases.name: 該当なし: すべて合格ライン未満

input.factory: () => ({ line: 50, score: function(add) { return this.points + add - this.miss * 3; }, candidates: [{ name: "North", points: 30, miss: 2, args: [5] }, { name: "East", points: 42, miss: 1, args: [0] }, { name: "West", points: 20, miss: 0, args: [15] }] })

cases.name: 空配列: 候補がない

input.factory: () => ({ line: 10, score: function(add) { return this.base + add; }, candidates: [] })

cases.name: 順序: 点数順ではなく元の順番を保つ

input.factory: () => ({ line: 70, score: function(first, second, third) { return this.value + first * this.rate + second - third; }, candidates: [{ name: "First", value: 80, rate: 1, args: [0, 0, 0] }, { name: "Second", value: 10, rate: 3, args: [25, 0, 0] }, { name: "Third", value: 67, rate: 2, args: [1, 1, 0] }, { name: "Fourth", value: 40, rate: 4, args: [3, 5, 1] }] })
